# Copilot Instructions

## General Rules

- Always read the full contents of a file before making any edits to it. Never edit a file you have not read first.
- All `README.md` files must be written in English.
- All documentation files (`.md`) must be written in English unless explicitly requested otherwise by the user.

## Code Style

- Refactor code into small, single-responsibility functions. Avoid large monolithic blocks of code.
- Each function should do one thing and do it well.
- Use constants for configuration values (e.g., sample rates, durations) at the top of the file.
